jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Aptech
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
jsonLd.skills: Go, REST APIs, TypeScript, SQL, React, Docker, Agile/Scrum, Java
